28:38.arabic: وَقَالَ فِرْعَوْنُ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَأُ مَا عَلِمْتُ لَكُم مِّنْ إِلَـٰهٍ غَيْرِى
28:38.english: Pharaoh said: O chiefs, I know of no god for you other than myself.
28:38.score_notes: Anti-version of Nuh's call. Pharaoh flips the prophet's formula — ultimate arrogance. Audio already downloaded.

lesson_use.rejection_reason: Very long. Pattern dropped from v2 table.
